title: Google Sheets node execution failed due to missing credentials
symptom: The Google Sheets node fails with a 'Node Execution Failed' error when the OAuth token is expired or missing.
not_this_if: Error is related to data issues or API rate limits
root_cause: The error occurs when the OAuth token used for authentication has expired or is not properly set up, preventing the node from accessing the Google Sheets API.
fix_steps: Go to the Credentials section in n8n
Ensure the OAuth token is valid and up to date
agent_instruction: Re-authenticate the Google Sheets credentials to ensure the OAuth token is valid.
